posts.author: bearishbhaiya
posts.text: CME expands 24/7 trading to Gold and Crude Oil — Chicago Mercantile Exchange Group has announced two commodity market changes, both subject to regulatory approval. 24/7 trading for its existing 1 Ounce Gold futures contract, which is expected to begin on July 26. A new 10 Barrel WTI Crude Oil futures contract, scheduled to launch on August 30. If you follow commodity markets, CME is introducing a new 10 Barrel WTI Crude Oil futures contract. The benchmark WTI contract is 1,000 barrels and the existing Micro WTI contract is 100 barrels. This new contract will be one tenth the size of Micro WTI.…
